response.overview: Do you dare to step foot on the time travel highway? Join Syd as he  navigates his way through time and space, lost memories and experiencing  non-negotiable side effects of the toll required to sustain his  journey.  Fighting for a past he's slowly forgetting and a future he has  no place in.  Dive into the suspenseful world of "The Dark Road," a captivating short film that explores the haunting journey of Syd, a rugged survivor on a quest to reclaim his past in a surreal, otherworldly landscape. Amidst mysterious figures and enigmatic challenges, Syd battles to retain the memories that define him, driven by a poignant narrative that questions the very essence of identity. Watch as Syd confronts the enigmatic Toll Master in a bid to reverse the curses of his forgotten life. Don't miss this gripping tale of loss, sacrifice, and the relentless pursuit of redemption.
response.tagline: Fighting for a past he's slowly forgetting
response.title: The Dark Road
